metadata.description: Azure Connectors skills marketplace — self-contained skills for coding agents (Copilot CLI, Claude Code).

plugins.name: azure-connectorgateway
plugins.description: Azure Connector Gateway — manage gateways, connections, and triggers. Connects external services (Office 365, Teams, Microsoft Forms, SharePoint, OneDrive, GitHub, Azure Blob) to sandbox apps via event-driven triggers or direct API calls using connection runtime URLs.
